violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Speed racks & dunnage racks in walk in cooler have an accumulation of food debris and need cleaning. Hot hold boxes have build-up and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinet storage shelving has accumulation of dust/debris and in in need of cleaning.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Grease trap leaks need to be repaired.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in dish area. Pooling water issues from grease trap leak.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floors are torn/damaged in multiple areas of facility. Holding water pockets.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
